rows.label: tev001194_MSG0001
rows.name:
What are you doing here, [ST:playername ]? You must
enjoy this place as much as I do, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0002
rows.name:
It's a beautiful sight, isn't it...
So what's catching your eye today?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_JNK0010
rows.name: The Pizza

rows.label: tev001194_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Elma you're watching the
Ma-non savor their pizza.

rows.label: tev001194_JNK0020
rows.name: The Light

rows.label: tev001194_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Elma you're entranced
by the beautiful light.

rows.label: tev001194_JNK0030
rows.name: The Friendship

rows.label: tev001194_SEL0031
rows.name:
Tell Elma you're watching the
xenoforms interact peacefully.

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0003
rows.name: You sure do love food, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0004
rows.name: But I understand how you feel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's hard to watch how much they
relish eating that pizza and not
want to scarf down a slice yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0006
rows.name:
I love how pizzas can be made with
whatever toppings you want. There's
so much variety and personality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's truly impressive the way humans
are able to embellish food like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0008
rows.name:
And it's wonderful that the Ma-non
acknowledge the effort that takes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0009
rows.name:
But when I talked about looking
at a "beautiful sight," I
wasn't talking about pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0010
rows.name:
Although it's basically the same as what
I meant to say. So that's good enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0011
rows.name:
Well, this conversation has left me hungry
for pizza, so I think I'm going to go visit
one of the cafés in the commercial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0012
rows.name:
Did you know that nowadays you can get
pizza from any café in the city? It's
pretty handy if you're a fan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0013
rows.name: Ah, indeed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'm sure the Ma-non don't
give it a second thought, but
it certainly is beautiful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0015
rows.name:
Did you know that this light is the
power source for this entire vessel?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0016
rows.name:
It's some sort of perpetual motion machine that
doesn't produce a very high energy output, but
is both perfectly safe and completely clean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0017
rows.name:
I doubt humanity has the technological
capacity to pull off anything like
it, at least not yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0018
rows.name:
But I'm sure it'll be available to
us someday. Vandham has practically
been salivating at the thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0019
rows.name:
This light is to the Ma-non
what fire is to humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0020
rows.name:
And like fire, one day it won't seem
special at all. It'll just be a part
of our world that we take for granted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0021
rows.name:
Mankind advances. And if it's by
joining hands with xenoforms, that
only makes it all the more impressive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0022
rows.name:
You noticed? That's what
I've been watching.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0023
rows.name:
I wonder if the humans of even
a short time ago could have
imagined a scene like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0024
rows.name:
I was aware of the possibility,
but certainly never imagined
it would happen so quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0025
rows.name:
Humans are a species that seems
able to make friends with anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0026
rows.name:
Any people who share a desire
to protect something can work
together to achieve that goal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0027
rows.name:
It's a basic behavioral principle,
yet one that's entirely foreign
to a group like the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0028
rows.name:
And that's why so many different xenoforms
can live peacefully in a human city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001194_MSG0029
rows.name:
When I watch this, I feel like it gives me
strength. It's a testament of how the power
to form bonds can change the world.[ST:wait ]
